test.note: Exit code 1 from 9 pre-existing test failures in non-milestone test files (uniswap-client: 6, bankr-gateway: 2, onboarding FeatureTour: 1). All 87 milestone-relevant tests pass with exit code 0. Failures are caused by edge-function proxy URL expectations and a FeatureTour text query, none related to milestone 1 work.

lint.note: 0 errors, 14 warnings (all pre-existing react-refresh/only-export-components and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: pre-existing test failures in uniswap-client (6), bankr-gateway (2), and onboarding FeatureTour (1) are known and caused by edge-function proxy URL expectations. Workers on those milestones should fix these tests as part of their feature work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 7 milestone 1 workers independently documented these as pre-existing failures. The pattern is consistent: tests expect direct API URLs (e.g. https://trade-api.gateway.uniswap.org) but code now routes through Supabase edge function proxies (e.g. ${SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/uniswap-proxy?endpoint=...).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: VAL-THREE-* assertions require headed/manual browser evidence since headless Chromium lacks WebGPU support. Unit tests covering data-sync and overlay states provide primary validation in CI.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m1-three-scene-live-agent-sync noted that 3D scene rendering cannot be fully validated in headless environments. The 20-case test suite covers the data pipeline and graceful degradation overlays but not actual WebGPU rendering.
